description: EVEZ Autonomous Ecosystem — root hash anchor. All epochs descend from here.
canonical_law: Nothing becomes truth until it has an event_id, provenance, and a valid chain hash.
defense_only_charter: This system may monitor, warn, coordinate, simulate, and recommend. It may not direct harm, coercion, or irreversible actions against people or their rights.
note: This is the genesis block. All subsequent events chain from this hash. Tampering with this record breaks all downstream chain verification.
